summary: Full backend + frontend test of Kiki Centre admission landing page. All backend endpoints (root, admission CRUD, AI chat) pass pytest. All key frontend flows verified: hero CTA, anchor scroll, 3 courses, multi-step admission form (validation + successful submission persisting to MongoDB with no _id leak), WhatsApp button, AI Assistant returning real Claude Sonnet 4.5 replies with session persistence, Made-with-Emergent badge removed, mobile sticky CTA appears on scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: logger is referenced in submit_application (line 113) but logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) are defined AFTER api_router endpoints in server.py. This works at runtime because endpoints are called after module load, but it's brittle ordering. Move logger setup above route definitions.

AdmissionForm.jsx COURSES list contains 'Mechatronics (Automation & Robotics)' while backend list_applications + emails will get this exact value; ensure analytics/reporting filters use the same canonical name. Also 'Short Term Course' and 'Not sure — guide me' are valid course values accepted by the backend (no enum validation) — backend's `course: str` accepts any string. Consider Pydantic Literal/enum validation for stricter data.

AI chat history: every /api/ai/chat call writes user+assistant rows to chat_messages, but LlmChat session_id only ensures the SDK retains in-memory or DB-side history depending on its implementation. Verify multi-turn context persists across separate HTTP requests for the same session_id (current tests show it returns valid replies for follow-up message but doesn't strictly prove memory retention). Add explicit short-term memory test if needed.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded via projection {"_id": 0} — good.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Either set explicit origins in CORS_ORIGINS or set allow_credentials=False.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: One test admission record created via UI flow: QA Tester / qa10904@example.com / Tool & Die Making (visible in /api/admission/applications). Also 1 record via pytest with TEST_ prefix email.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_kiki_backend.py covers root, admission validation (422 missing fields, 422 invalid email), admission create+list with _id exclusion check, and AI chat (reply length + session persistence). Frontend Playwright flow validated: hero -> scroll-to-apply -> step1 validation -> step1 fill -> step2 select shadcn dropdowns (use page.get_by_role('option', name=...).click(force=True) with a 400ms wait_for_timeout after opening trigger) -> step3 submit -> admission-success testid. AI assistant uses suggestion buttons or fill+send. NOTE: 'Step X of 3' is rendered uppercase via CSS text-transform — use case-insensitive substring checks on inner_text. urllib.request gets 403 from preview URL CDN; use requests or curl with User-Agent header instead.
